title: D-01: Implement auth scaffold (signup/login) with RBAC groundwork
body: Create authentication scaffold for sign up and sign in; establish initial RBAC roles (Learner, Admin) and protected API endpoints.

title: D-02: Password hashing and validation
body: Add secure password storage (bcrypt/Argon2) and validate hashed passwords during login.

title: D-03: JWT-based authentication and session management
body: Implement JWT issuance on login, validation on protected endpoints, and optional refresh flow.

title: D-04: RBAC middleware and protected routes
body: Enforce role-based access controls on core APIs (decks, cards, sessions); return proper responses on violations.

title: D-05: Theme switching (light/dark) and persistence
body: Add UI theme toggle with user preference persistence across sessions.

title: G-01: Topic input flow (UI) to trigger AI generation
body: UI field to enter topic; triggers AI deck generation API and shows loading state.

title: G-02: AI deck creation endpoint (4–5 decks)
body: Backend endpoint to request AI-generated decks; returns 4-5 decks with cards.

title: G-03: AI prompts management and logging
body: Store prompts, versions, and AI usage logs for audit and improvement.

title: G-04: AI failure handling and fallback
body: Gracefully handle AI failures with user-friendly messaging and fallback options.

title: G-05: AI usage narrative in README
body: Document how AI is used (prompts, safeguards) in the README and specs prompts directory.

title: A-01: Deck catalog UI (2–3 decks on load)
body: Show initial 2-3 decks in the catalog with title, card count, and mastery badge.

title: A-02: Deck detail view
body: Deck detail page showing description, card count, mastery, and start button.

title: A-03: Deck search/filter
body: Search decks by text; filter by category/difficulty; show empty state handling.

title: A-04: DeckCard component stories (Storybook)
body: Create Storybook stories for core deck UI components (min 3 states each).

title: A-05: Basic API surface for decks/cards
body: CRUD endpoints for decks and cards; read-only for learners; basic validation.

title: B-01: Start session endpoint
body: Create a new study session bound to a user and a deck; initial card loaded.

title: B-02: Card presentation, reveal and grading
body: UI for revealing answers and grading recall; record Attempt; schedule next card.

title: B-03: SM2-like scheduler and doneness timer
body: Implement lightweight SM2-like scheduler; add per-session timer.

title: B-04: Session summary
body: Return summary with cards reviewed, accuracy, points, and streak.

title: B-05: Day progression trigger
body: Support moving to the next day with new decks/orders; reset state as needed.

title: C-01: Points system
body: Award points for studying; reflect in profile.

title: C-02: Streaks
body: Track and display study streaks; ensure daily activity is counted.

title: C-03: Mastery rewards/badges
body: Detect deck mastery; award badges and emit events.

title: C-04: Profile/history view
body: Profile page with per-deck mastery, total points, streaks, and past sessions.

title: C-05: Visual progress indicators
body: Doneness indicators, progress bars, and badges in UI.

title: D-01: CI/CD pipeline
body: Automate build, test, and deploy flows; PR checks.

title: D-02: Dockerize FE and BE
body: Docker compose setup for frontend and backend; dev env parity.

title: D-03: Scalar API docs UI
body: Expose scalar docs UI for API references (no Swagger).

title: D-04: README updates (AI usage, advanced features)
body: Document AI usage narrative and 3 advanced features; update README.

title: D-05: Spec alignment and evidence storage
body: Store AI prompts and evidence in specs/ prompts directory.

title: X-01: Storybook integration
body: Initialize Storybook and add starter stories for core components.

title: X-02: Accessibility audit
body: Perform basic accessibility checks for core flows; track issues.

title: X-03: Cypress end-to-end tests
body: Develop Cypress tests for critical user flows (signin, topic input, AI deck gen, study loop).

title: X-04: Logging & metrics
body: Structured logging and basic metrics (latency, error rate) for observability.

title: X-05: Data migrations & seed data
body: Seed initial decks/cards; manage migrations for MVP data model.
